name: Beast Slayer Shield
nameZh: 兽屠阿尔布雷希特的盾牌
description: The infamous Beast of Ratten terrorized the countryside for several years, slaughtering at least a hundred livestock and a couple dozen peasants. Fortunately, it was tracked down and slain by Sir Albrecht - may the Host bless his brave soul.
descriptionZh: “拉滕狂兽”当年盘踞一方，害死牲口上百头、村民数十人，恶名昭著，所幸死于阿尔布雷希特爵士刀下，愿圣主保佑爵士英魂。
